---
title: "Jakub Štenc"
format: html
editor: visual
navbar: 
    logo: "images/pyl.png"
    right: 
      - text: "English"
        href: index.html
      - text: "Česky"
        href: index_cz.html  
---

## Quarto

::: {.content-hiden when-profile="english"}
English
:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="czech"}
Česky
:::
